name: Schrödinger Operators
description: H=−Δ+V. Self-adjointness. Discrete vs essential spectrum. Weyl's theorem. Limit-point/limit-circle.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: H=−Δ+V\nSchrödinger op"]
    D2["Def: Form sum\nQ(h)=∫|∇u|²+V|u|²"]
    D3["Def: Discrete spectrum\nisolated finite mult"]
    D4["Def: Essential σ_ess\nσ∖discrete"]
    T1["Thm: Kato–Rellich\nV rel bounded ⇒ self-adj"]
    T2["Thm: Weyl\nσ_ess(−Δ+V)=σ_ess(−Δ)"]
    T3["Thm: HVZ\n3-body ess spectrum"]
    T4["Thm: Birman–Schwinger\nbound state criterion"]
    T5["Thm: Limit point/circle\n1D classification"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T1
    D3 --> D4
    D1 --> T2
    T2 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
